# March Madness Analysis

## Optimized Weights for Each Model
![Optimized Weights for Each Model](images/figure1.png)

## Model Accuracy Comparison
![Model Accuracy Comparison](images/figure2.png)

## Correlation Matrix
![Correlation Matrix](images/figure3.png)

## Logistic Stacking Model Weights
![Logistic Stacking Model Weights](images/figure4.png)
